stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP696 file 4.12. According to the Allowable Take-Off Mass section of the load sheet of a Commercial Air Transport aeroplane. Concerning the determination of values a, b and c, which of the following statements is correct?

1. a = Actual ZFM + Take-Off Fuel
2. a = MZFM + Take-Off Fuel
3. b= the lower mass of Performance-Limited TOM and Maximum Structural TOM
4. b= the higher mass of Performance-Limited TOM and Maximum Structural TOM
5. c= the lower mass of Performance-Limited LM and Maximum Structural LM + Trip Fuel
6. c= the higher mass of Performance-Limited LM and Maximum Structural LM + Trip Fuel.
